mapper.select: SELECT gb_DOH_dis_goods_id FROM gb_department_orders_history WHERE gb_DOH_department_id = #{depId} AND gb_DOH_apply_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL #{windowDays} DAY GROUP BY gb_DOH_dis_goods_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= #{minTimes} order by gb_DOH_dis_goods_id

SELECT gb_DOH_apply_date AS date, SUM(gb_DOH_quantity) AS qty FROM gb_department_orders_history WHERE gb_DOH_department_id = #{depId} AND gb_DOH_dis_goods_id = #{gid} AND gb_DOH_apply_date >= CURDATE() - INTERVAL #{windowDays} DAY GROUP BY gb_DOH_apply_date

SELECT t.gb_DOH_dis_goods_id AS nxDohDisGoodsId, t.gb_DOH_quantity AS nxDohQuantity, t.gb_DOH_apply_date AS nxDohApplyDate, t.gb_DOH_standard AS nxDohStandard FROM ( SELECT gb_DOH_dis_goods_id, gb_DOH_quantity, gb_DOH_apply_date, gb_DOH_standard, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY gb_DOH_dis_goods_id ORDER BY gb_DOH_apply_date DESC ) AS rn FROM gb_department_orders_history WHERE gb_DOH_department_id = #{depId} AND gb_DOH_dis_goods_id = #{gid} ) t WHERE t.rn = 1
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_department_orders_history where gb_department_orders_history_id in
#{gbDepartmentOrdersHistoryId}
